title: Shri Swaminarayan Mandir, Vadtal
tagline: Shri Swaminarayan Mandir, Vadtal — spiritual town of Gujarat

overview.short: Swaminarayan Mandir, Vadtal (Devanagari: श्री स्वामिनारायण मन्दिर, वडताल) headquarters of the LaxmiNarayan Dev Gadi are located in this temple in Vadtal.
overview.description: Swaminarayan Mandir, Vadtal (Devanagari: श्री स्वामिनारायण मन्दिर, वडताल) headquarters of the LaxmiNarayan Dev Gadi are located in this temple in Vadtal. There are three main shrines in the temple - the central shrine dedicated to Lakshmi Narayan. The right shrine is dedicated to Radha Krishna and the left shrine has Vasudev, Dharma and Bhakti. The wooden pillars of the temple bear colourful wood carvings.

topPlaces.name: Vadtal
topPlaces.description: Vadtal is located in the Kheda district of Gujarat, India. It is the pilgrim centre of Swaminarayan Sampraday and the headquarters of Swaminarayan's temple.

topPlaces.name: Lakshmi Narayan Dev Gadi
topPlaces.description: The Lakshmi Narayan Dev Gadi (Gujarati:- લક્ષ્મીનારાયણ દેવ ગાદી) is one of the two gadis (diocese) that together form the Swaminarayan Sampradaya. It is headquartered at the Shri Swaminarayan Mandir, Vadtal and controls the Dakshin Vibhag Lekh.

topPlaces.name: Bakrol
topPlaces.description: Bakrol is an Indian village. It has recently become a part of Anand, Gujarat.

topPlaces.name: Karamsad
topPlaces.description: Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel, one of India's greatest leaders in the Indian Independence Movement grew up in Karamsad. It was also the home of his elder brother Vithalbhai Patel, who was also an important political leader.

topPlaces.name: Vitthal Udyognagar INA
topPlaces.description: Vitthal Udyognagar is a town and Vitthal Udyognagar INA is a co-extensive industrial notified area in Anand district in the Indian state of Gujarat.

topPlaces.name: Birla Vishvakarma Mahavidyalaya
topPlaces.description: Birla Vishvakarma Mahavidyalaya (BVM) is a Grant-In Aid + Private engineering college in Vallabh Vidyanagar, Gujarat, India. It is affiliated to Gujarat Technological University.

topPlaces.name: Boriavi
topPlaces.description: Boriavi is a city in Anand district in the state of Gujarat, India.

topPlaces.name: Changa, Anand
topPlaces.description: The village of Changa is about 15 kilometres (9.3 mi) west of the tehsil headquarters Petlad and about 20 kilometres (12 mi) northwest of the district headquarters Anand. The village is situated on Nadiad-Khambhat road.

items.note: Vadtal is located in the Kheda district of Gujarat, India. It is the pilgrim centre of Swaminarayan Sampraday and the headquarters of Swaminarayan's temple.

The Lakshmi Narayan Dev Gadi (Gujarati:- લક્ષ્મીનારાયણ દેવ ગાદી) is one of the two gadis (diocese) that together form the Swaminarayan Sampradaya. It is headquartered at the Shri Swaminarayan Mandir, Vadtal and controls the Dakshin Vibhag Lekh.
Bakrol is an Indian village. It has recently become a part of Anand, Gujarat.

Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel, one of India's greatest leaders in the Indian Independence Movement grew up in Karamsad. It was also the home of his elder brother Vithalbhai Patel, who was also an important political leader.
Vitthal Udyognagar is a town and Vitthal Udyognagar INA is a co-extensive industrial notified area in Anand district in the Indian state of Gujarat.
Birla Vishvakarma Mahavidyalaya (BVM) is a Grant-In Aid + Private engineering college in Vallabh Vidyanagar, Gujarat, India. It is affiliated to Gujarat Technological University.
Boriavi is a city in Anand district in the state of Gujarat, India.

The village of Changa is about 15 kilometres (9.3 mi) west of the tehsil headquarters Petlad and about 20 kilometres (12 mi) northwest of the district headquarters Anand. The village is situated on Nadiad-Khambhat road.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Shri Swaminarayan Mandir, Vadtal?
faq.a: The best time to visit Shri Swaminarayan Mandir, Vadtal is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Shri Swaminarayan Mandir, Vadtal?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Vadodara Airport (46 km) and the nearest railway station is Vadodara Junction (44 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Shri Swaminarayan Mandir, Vadtal?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Shri Swaminarayan Mandir, Vadtal at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Shri Swaminarayan Mandir, Vadtal?
faq.a: Stays in Shri Swaminarayan Mandir, Vadtal start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Shri Swaminarayan Mandir, Vadtal?
faq.a: The top attractions are Vadtal, Lakshmi Narayan Dev Gadi, Bakrol, Karamsad, Vitthal Udyognagar INA.
